context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the implement-graphql instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when **designing, implementing, or reviewing GraphQL APIs** in a Rails application with the `graphql-ruby` gem.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Before shipping a resolver/mutation slice, ALL of the following must be true (details in linked sections; do not duplicate checks in prose here):

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: TESTING.md: specs in `spec/graphql/` use `AppSchema.execute` — **ALL spec files** (resolver specs AND mutation specs). Never use HTTP controller dispatch for GraphQL specs.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: SPEC:       Write failing spec (happy path + auth + validation error case) — see TESTING.md

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: FINAL CHECK: Verify every HARD-GATE item above against the code you wrote — all 8 must be true

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Prefer **dedicated resolver classes** over inline field blocks for non-trivial logic.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **FORBIDDEN:** Never call `object.association` directly and never use `.includes` on the scope — every association load MUST go through the dataloader (graphql-ruby 1.12+). This applies both in type field definitions and in list resolvers:

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: List resolvers must also prime the dataloader for each association the returned records will expose:

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write `description:` inline on **every** field in every type — no field left undescribed:
